passage: Jasmin grows bean pods in her garden. This year, she harvested 330 bean pods and saved10% of them to plant next year. How many of the harvested bean pods did Jasmin save to plant next year?

passage: A sphere has a radius of $\frac{8}{3}$ feet. What is the volume, in cubic feet, of the sphere?

test_name: December 2024 International Form C SAT Math Module 1
passage: A company that manufactures stapler's calculates its monthly profit, in dollars, by subtracting its fixed monthly costs, in dollars, from its monthly sales revenue, in dollars. The equation 11,000=2.00 x - 6,500 represents this situation for a month where x staplers are manufactured and sold. Which statement is the best interpretation of 2.00 x in this context?

choices.label: A
choices.text: The monthly sales revenue, in dollars, from selling x staplers

choices.label: B
choices.text: The monthly sales revenue, in dollars, from each stapler sold

choices.label: C
choices.text: The monthly cost, in dollars, of manufacturing each stapler

choices.label: D
choices.text: The monthly cost, in dollars, of manufacturing x staplers
